name: Swing 365 Golf - Houston
about: Swing 365 Golf provides a state-of-the-art golf simulator experience in a warm and inviting private club atmosphere. The venue operates on a membership-based model, offering 24/7 access to individual simulator suites that can be booked online. Members enjoy unlimited simulator time, with options ranging from 60 to 120 minutes per day depending on the tier, allowing for flexible gameplay and practice schedules.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Full Swing Pro Series simulators with 688 infrared sensors for high-speed, accurate ball flight data
Membership-based model offers 365/24/7 access to private suites for ultimate flexibility
Extensive library of 95+ world-class courses, including Pebble Beach
BYOB policy allows golfers to bring their own food and beverages for a personalized experience

food_and_drink.notes: Bring your own food is allowed
Bring your own beverages (BYOB) is allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Widescreen simulator with 688 infrared sensors across two tracks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB/Food is allowed, and you can bring your own food and beverages to enjoy during your session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole simulation session is approximately 60-90 minutes, depending on the course and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue is not marketed as kid-friendly and operates as a private club with membership requirements.
